abilities.name: Delta Reactor
abilities.text: As long as any Stadium card with Holon in its name is in play, each of your Pokémon that has δ on its card does 10 more damage to the Defending Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

tests.name: delta_reactor_bonus_with_holon_stadium
tests.description: Test that Delta Reactor adds +10 damage when Holon Stadium is in play

tests.name: delta_reactor_no_bonus_without_stadium
tests.description: Test that Delta Reactor does not add bonus without Holon Stadium

tests.name: delta_reactor_only_affects_delta
tests.description: Test that Delta Reactor only boosts delta Pokemon damage

tests.name: hyper_beam_discard_on_heads
tests.description: Test that Hyper Beam discards defender's Energy on heads
